title: Employment rate
subtitle: Percentage of the working age population in employment

title: Decent Homes
subtitle: Percentage of homes meeting the Decent Homes Standard

title: Relative poverty
subtitle: Percentage of people living in London households with income below 50% contemporary median – After Housing Costs (AHC)

title: Neighbourhood cohesion
subtitle: Proportion of Londoners who agree that people from different backgrounds get on well in their local area (%)

title: Social isolation
subtitle: Proportion who agree that if they needed help there are people who would be there for them (%)

title: Recorded hate crime
subtitle: Number of hate crime offences in London as recorded by the MPS
source: Met Police, MPS Monthly Crime Dashboard Data

title: Greenhouse Gas emissions in London
subtitle: Megatons of carbon dioxide equivalent (MtCO2e)
source: London Energy and Greenhouse Gas Inventory (LEGGI), GLA

title: Annual mean concentration of PM2.5 at the roadside between 2015 and 2024
subtitle: Micrograms per cubic meter (µg/m3)
source: London Air, Air Quality England, UK-Air

title: Annual mean concentration of NO2 at the roadside between 2015 and 2024
subtitle: Micrograms per cubic meter (µg/m3)
source: London Air, Air Quality England, UK-Air

title: Connections with nature
subtitle: Percentage of adult Londoners who agree/ strongly agree/completely agree that they ‘feel part of nature’
source: Natural England (2024) People and Nature Surveys for England

title: Heat-associated deaths
subtitle: Estimated number of heat-associated deaths in London
source: UKHSA Heat mortality monitoring reports 2020-2024, Public Health England

title: Household waste recycling rate
subtitle: % of collected household waste that is recycled
source: DEFRA, Local authority collected waste management - annual results

title: Employers' views on the proficiency of their workforce
subtitle: Percentage of employees who are not fully proficient at their job

title: Skills shortage vacancies
subtitle: Percentage of skills shortage vacancies

title: Employer provision of training
subtitle: Percentage of establishments that have funded or arranged any training for staff over the past 12 months

title: Outcomes for Higher Education (HE) learners
subtitle: Percentage of students from a London Higher Education Institution (HEI) who have a positive destination (%)
source: Department of Education, LEO Graduate and Postgraduate Outcomes

title: Outcomes for Further Education (FE) learners
subtitle: Percentage of FE and Skills learners with a positive destination (including employment and further learning), London 2017/18 - 2021/22

title: Online job postings over time
subtitle: Number of unique monthly job postings in London, all occupations

title: People with no qualifications in London
subtitle: Percentage of people aged 16-64 with no qualifications

title: People with a Level 3 or above qualification in London
subtitle: Percentage of people aged 16-64 with Level3+ qualifications

title: Most in-demand common skills
subtitle: Top common skills in demand as measured by frequency in job postings (%)

title: Most in-demand technical skills
subtitle: Top technical skills in demand as measured by frequency in job postings (%)

title: Violence with Injury
subtitle: Number of offences recorded monthly by the MPS

title: Proven reoffending rate
subtitle: % of offender cohort that committed a further proven offence within 12 months
source: Ministry of Justice, Proven Reoffending Statistics: April to June 2023

title: Victimisation rate
subtitle: Percentage experiencing something they consider to be a crime during the month/quarter prior

title: Satisfaction level of reporting victims
subtitle: Percentage of survey participants

title: Worried about Crime
subtitle: Percentage of Londoners worried about crime and ASB in their local area

title: Trust in the Metropolitan Police Service
subtitle: Percentage of survey participants (PAS) who agree that the MPS is an organisation that they can trust

title: Total Notifiable Offences (TNOs)
subtitle: Number of offences recorded annually by the Metropolitan Police Service (MPS)
source: MOPAC Crime Dashboard, MPS Crime Dashboard

title: Life expectancy at birth
subtitle: Life expectancy at birth in London and England by sex, 2011-13 to 2021-23 (three year rolling averages)
source: Public health profiles, OHID (based on ONS data)

title: Healthy life expectancy at birth
subtitle: Healthy life expectancy at birth in London and England by sex, 2011-13 to 2021-23 (three year rolling averages)
source: Public health profiles, OHID (based on ONS data)

title: Infant mortality rate
subtitle: Infant deaths under 1 year of age per 1,000 live births in London and England, 2001-03 to 2021–23 (three year rolling averages)
source: Public health profiles, OHID (based on ONS data)

title: Premature death from cardiovascular disease
subtitle: Under 75 directly standardised mortality rate per 100,000 from all circulatory diseases in London and England, 2001-03 to 2021-23 (three year rolling averages)
source: Public health profiles, OHID (based on ONS data)

title: Premature death from cancer
subtitle: Under 75 directly standardised mortality rate per 100,000 from cancer in London and England, 2001-03 to 2021-23 (three year rolling averages)
source: Public health profiles, OHID (based on ONS data)

title: Public satisfaction with the NHS
subtitle: Percentage of individuals responding either ‘Very satisfied’ or ‘Quite satisfied’ to ‘How satisfied or dissatisfied would you say you are with the way in which the NHS runs nowadays?’, London and England, 2015-2021
source: Public health profiles, OHID (based on ONS data)

title: Public satisfaction with social care
subtitle: Proportion of individuals either ‘Extremely or very satisfied’ or ‘Quite satisfied' with the care and support services you receive?’, London and England, 2016/17 to 2023/24
source: Public health profiles, OHID (based on ONS data)

title: Prevalence of low birth weight of term babies
subtitle: Percentage of all live births in London and England with gestational age of 37+ weeks, with a birth weight of <2.5 kg, 2006-2022
source: Public health profiles, OHID (based on ONS data)

title: Smoking prevalence in adults
subtitle: % of adults aged 18 and over who are current smokers in London and England, 2011 to 2023
source: Public health profiles, OHID (based on the Annual Population Survey, ONS)

title: Anxiety and life satisfaction for adults
subtitle: Mean responses on a scale from 0-10 to “Overall, how anxious did you feel yesterday”, and "Overall, how satisfied are you with your life nowadays?” for adults in London and England, 2011-12 to 2022-23
source: Office for National Statistics (Based on Labour Force Survey)

title: Childhood vaccination rates in London
subtitle: Childhood vaccination rates (%) for selected vaccinations, 2011/12 to 2023/24
source: Public health profiles, OHID (based on ONS data)

title: Energy efficiency ratings of new and existing homes, London
subtitle: % of all domestic Energy Performance Certificates (EPCs) with a rating of A-C out of all domestic EPCs registered on the Energy Performance of Buildings Register

title: School readiness at age 5
subtitle: Percentage of children with a good level of development (GLD) at age 5, 2013/14 to 2023/24
source: Public health profiles, OHID (based on ONS data)

title: Average Attainment 8 (Key Stage 4/GCSEs) score
subtitle: Average Attainment 8 score (out of 90)3 per pupil in London and England, 2015/16 to 2022/23
source: Public health profiles, OHID (based on Active Lives Adult Survey, Sport England)

title: Children’s self-reported happiness with life
subtitle: Children in Years 3-11 mean self-reported happiness score with life (out of 10) in London and England, 2018/18 to 2023/24
source: Active Lives Children and Young People Survey, Sports England

title: Children’s perception of safety
subtitle: Proportion of young people aged 11-16 in London who feel safe at school, in the area they live and online, 2018 and 2021/22

title: Achievement of Level 3 qualifications by age 19
subtitle: Proportion of 19-year-olds achieving a Level-3 qualification in London and England, 2007/08 to 2023/24

title: Young people Not in Education, Employment, or Training (NEET)
subtitle: Proportion of young people aged 16-24 NEET in Q4 (October-December), 2000-2024
source: Department for Education (based on the Labour Force Survey, ONS)

title: Prevalence of obesity in children
subtitle: Proportion of children in Reception and Year 6 that are overweight or obese1 in London and England, 2007/08 to 2023/24
source: Public health profiles, OHID (based on National Child Measurement Programme data)

title: Children with a probable mental disorder
subtitle: Proportion of children aged 10-15 in UK and London with high or very high total difficulties score (18 or more)2, 2009/10 to 2021/22

title: School suspension rate
subtitle: Suspension rate per 100 pupils in state-funded schools in London and England, 2006/7 to 2022/23

title: School permanent exclusion rate (PER)
subtitle: Permanent exclusion rate per 100 pupils for London and England, 2006/07 to 2022/23

title: School absence
subtitle: Overall school absence rates (%) for pupils in state-funded schools in London and England, 2006/07 to 2023/24

title: Influencing decisions in local area
subtitle: Proportion who feel able to influence decisions affecting their local area (%)

title: Food security
subtitle: Percentage of households with differing levels of food insecurity

title: Talking to neighbours
subtitle: Proportion who chat to their neighbours at least once a month (%)

title: Disability pay gap
subtitle: Percentage difference between median hourly earnings of disabled and non-disabled workers, expressed as a percentage of disabled workers’ earnings - London vs UK

title: Gender pay gap
subtitle: Percentage difference between median hourly earnings of men and women, expressed as a percentage of men's earnings - London vs UK

title: Voter registration
subtitle: Proportion of eligible adults aged 18+ who are registered for local elections (%)
source: Electoral statistics for the UK; Mid-Year Population Estimates

title: Unfair treatment
subtitle: Proportion of Londoners treated unfairly in the last 12 months because of one or several protected characteristics or because of their social class

title: Social action
subtitle: Proportion who were personally involved in social action in the last year (%)

title: Formal volunteering
subtitle: Proportion who formally volunteered at least once in the last year (%)

title: Informal volunteering
subtitle: Proportion who informally volunteered at least once in the last year (%)

title: Neighbourhood trust
subtitle: Proportion who agree that many of the people can be trusted in their local neighbourhood (%)

title: Household bills arrears
subtitle: Proportion with household bills in arrears

title: Ethnicity pay gap
subtitle: Percentage difference between median hourly earnings of Black, Asian and minority ethnic groups and all White groups, expressed as a percentage of all White groups’ earnings - London vs Rest of England and Wales

title: London's productivity
subtitle: Real GVA per hour worked (2019 = 100),London and the UK

title: London’s economic growth rate
subtitle: Real annual Gross Value Added (GVA) growth rate (%)
source: GLA calculations, Office for National Statistics

title: Involuntary worklessness
subtitle: Share of 16-64 unemployed or inactive and would like to work

title: Job quality
subtitle: Average job quality indicator and components, % share of employees, 2022

title: High streets and town centres with increased visitor footfall
subtitle: Percentage of high streets and town centres that saw an increase in footfall on previous year, 2023-2024.

title: High streets and town centres with increased spend
subtitle: Percentage of high streets and town centres that saw an increase in real-terms spend on the previous year, 2023-2024

title: Vacancy rates for London high streets and town centres, 2024
subtitle: Distribution of vacancy rates for inner and outer London high streets and town centres.
source: Data by LDC/Green Street, via the High Streets Data Service

title: Business births and closures
subtitle: Number of births and closures (four-quarter moving average)
source: GLA calculations, Office for National Statistics

title: Change in economic output by industry
subtitle: Percentage change in real GVA by industry in London 2019 – 2023
source: GLA Economics based on ONS – UK regional GVA and GDP data

title: High streets and town centres with increased purchases
subtitle: Percentage of London high streets and town centres that saw increased purchases on the previous year, 2023-2024
source: Aggregated and anonymised data by Mastercard, via the High Streets Data Service

title: Travel demand by mode
subtitle: Travel demand on the principal modes, index 2019/20=100.

title: Active travel
subtitle: Proportion of London residents undertaking 20 mins of active travel per day

title: Safety on London’s roads
subtitle: Number of people killed or seriously injured on London’s roads

title: Accessibility of the transport network
subtitle: Reduction from the 2016 baseline in the additional journey time using only the step-free transport network.

title: Quality of the bus network
subtitle: Average bus network speed in London, index (100=2015).

title: Active, efficient and sustainable mode share
subtitle: Percentage of trips made by walking, cycling and public transport (%)

title: Visits to London
subtitle: Annual domestic and international visits to London (2022–2024)

title: Foreign Direct Investment in London
subtitle: Number of projects (top series) and Capex £m (bottom series)
source: London & Partners, using fDi Markets from the Financial Times

title: International visits to London
subtitle: Annual inbound visits to London (`000) 2015-2024

title: Digital engagement with the arts
subtitle: Percentage of adults who engaged with the arts digitally in the last 12 months.

title: Spend in London
subtitle: Annual domestic and international spend in London (£ million, 2019 prices), 2022–2024

title: Physical engagement with the arts
subtitle: Percentage of adults who engaged with the arts in-person in the last 12 months, 2021/22 -2023/24

title: Visitor nights in London
subtitle: Annual domestic and international nights in London (2022–2024)

title: Struggling financially
subtitle: Proportion of Londoners struggling to make ends meet or having to go without basic needs, London monthly data shown Jan 22-Jan 25

title: Remediation of tall residential buildings with unsafe cladding
subtitle: % of residential buildings with unsafe cladding remediated

title: Londoners’ ability to meet their housing costs
subtitle: Percentage of London adults who say they have not been able to meet housing payments over the last six months, or have struggled to do so.
source: YouGov Plc on behalf of the GLA

title: Affordability in the private rental sector
subtitle: Index of private rent, earnings and implied affordability
source: YouGov Plc on behalf of the GLA

title: Londoners’ ability to pay their rent
subtitle: Percentage of households that find it fairly or very difficult to pay rent

title: New rough sleepers
subtitle: Number of people seen rough sleeping for the first time by outcome of the second night.

title: Sense of belonging to local neighbourhoods
subtitle: Percentage of adults feeling a sense of belonging in their local neighbourhood area

title: Satisfaction with local neighbourhood
subtitle: Percentage of adults very or fairly satisfied with their neighbourhood area as a place to live

title: Households in temporary accommodation
subtitle: Number of homeless households in temporary accommodation arranged by London boroughs

title: Rough sleeping
subtitle: Number of people sleeping rough over the month per 100,000 people

title: Households accepted as statutorily homeless
subtitle: Number of households owed a prevention or relief duty and accepted as statutorily homeless in London

title: Total fertility rate
subtitle: Children per woman
source: ONS Live birth estimates; calculations GLA

title: Annual births by mother’s country of birth, London
subtitle: Annual live births (thousands), for calendar years 2001 to 2023

title: Annual births in London
subtitle: Annual live births (thousands), for years ending June 2002 to December 2023
source: ONS Live birth estimates, ONS mid-year estimates

title: Annual births by age of mother, London
subtitle: Annual live births (thousands), for calendar years 2002 to 2023

title: Annual change in population, London
subtitle: (thousands)
source: ONS Population estimates for England and Wales; GLA modelled estimates

title: Population age structure
subtitle: (Persons per 1,000 total population), estimates for year ending June 2023
source: ONS Population estimates for England and Wales

title: Total population, London
subtitle: Total population (millions)
source: ONS Population estimates for England and Wales
